summary: Validated all 8 security artifacts (7 JSON, 1 YAML) generated by threat-architect in feeds/ and threat-models/ directories. All files passed structural validation using Python json.load() and yaml.safe_load(). No syntax errors, encoding issues, or malformed data detected. Total 49 records across CVE feeds, SBOM, threat models, architecture diagrams, and compliance formats (VEX, CNAPP, SARIF).
